inputs.label: Cost Price
inputs.businessContext: The base cost of the product.

businessContext_i18n.en: The base cost of the product.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le coût de base du produit.

inputs.label: Markup Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage added to cost to determine initial selling price before discount and tax.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage added to cost to determine initial selling price before discount and tax.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maliyete eklenen ve indirim ile vergi öncesi başlangıç satış fiyatını belirleyen yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der auf die Kosten aufgeschlagen wird, um den anfänglichen Verkaufspreis vor Rabatt und Steuer zu ermitteln
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage ajouté au coût pour déterminer le prix de vente initial avant remise et taxe.

inputs.label: Discount
inputs.businessContext: Percentage discount applied to the initial selling price before tax.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage discount applied to the initial selling price before tax.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi öncesi başlangıç satış fiyatına uygulanan yüzde indirim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentualer Rabatt, der auf den anfänglichen Verkaufspreis vor Steuer gewährt wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de remise appliqué au prix de vente initial avant taxe.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Sales tax rate applied to the discounted selling price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sales tax rate applied to the discounted selling price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirimli satış fiyatına uygulanan satış vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umsatzsteuersatz, der auf den reduzierten Verkaufspreis angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe de vente appliqué au prix de vente après remise.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
